title: C&I Leasing seals vessel partnership deal with Floatel
description: C&I Leasing plc has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Floatel International, as part of measures to contribute its quota to the development of the maritime sector. Speaking at the si
html:
C&I Leasing plc has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Floatel International, as part of measures to contribute its quota to the development of the maritime sector.

Speaking at the signing ceremony in Lagos, the Group Managing Director of C&I leasing Plc, Emeka Ndu explained that the new partnership has created a conducive atmosphere for the expansion of C&I Leasing.

Ndu said: “We are particularly excited at the prospects of this emerging sector and this partnership represents another significant milestone in the efforts of the organisation to compete even more aggressively in the offshore marine sector and to continually create value for investors.”

The Chief Executive Officer of the Floatel International, Peter Jacobsson, who described the company as a business oriented player in the maritime sector said vessels from its stable are carefully designed to meet clients’ expectations.

Jacobsson said: “Each of our vessels were carefully designed to provide the most modern accommodation facilities, outfitted with ample recreation and common areas providing maximum comfort for its guests.”
